scripts.circuit:compile: if not exist build mkdir build && bin\circom.exe circuits/Eligibility.circom --r1cs --wasm --sym -o build -l .
scripts.circuit:setup: snarkjs groth16 setup build/Eligibility.r1cs build/pot.ptau build/Eligibility.zkey
scripts.circuit:full: pnpm run circuit:compile && pnpm run circuit:setup && pnpm run circuit:export-verifier
